title: Who we're building for.
lede: Who they are. And what changes for them.

personas.name: Decision maker
personas.description: The person who signs off on adopting monday's AI Work Platform — cares about org-wide ROI, risk, and team adoption.

personas.name: End user — technical
personas.description: Hands-on with agents and integrations. Speaks MCP, APIs, workflows. Wants depth and control.

personas.name: End user — business
personas.description: Lives in monday day-to-day. Wants agents that just work and make their week lighter.

useCases.name: One flow for lead generation
useCases.pain: My lead-gen pipeline spans 5 tools (capture, enrichment, SDR agent, Slack, CRM) — keeping data in sync is a nightmare.
useCases.solution: One workflow connects every platform and agent via MCP; data flows end to end and stays tracked in monday.

useCases.name: Use case #2
useCases.pain: Customer pain — short, first-person, quoted from a real conversation.
useCases.solution: How this launch resolves the pain — one sentence, concrete.

useCases.name: Use case #3
useCases.pain: Customer pain — short, first-person, quoted from a real conversation.
useCases.solution: How this launch resolves the pain — one sentence, concrete.

beforeAfter.description: From isolated agents to a team that ships together — in full view.
From locked-in tools to an open ecosystem — agents plug in, monday plugs out.
From risky adoption to confident rollout.
